index.ts 中的 exports:
1. `LanguageModelUsage` (type) from "ai"
2. `createAgent` from "./agent"
3. `CheckpointHistoryOptions`, `OverflowRecoveryResult` (types) from "./checkpoint-history"
4. `CheckpointHistory` from "./checkpoint-history"
5. `Command`, `CommandAction`, `CommandContext`, `CommandRegistryConfig`, `CommandResult`, `SkillCommandResult` (types) from "./commands"
6. `configureCommandRegistry`, `createHelpCommand`, `executeCommand`, `getCommands`, `isCommand`, `isSkillCommandResult`, `parseCommand`, `registerCommand`, `resolveRegisteredCommandName` from "./commands"
7. `CompactionAppliedDetail`, `CompactionOrchestratorCallbacks`, `CompactionPhase`, `SpeculativeCompactionJob` (types) from "./compaction-orchestrator"
8. `applyReadyCompactionCore`, `blockAtHardLimitCore`, `CompactionOrchestrator`, `discardAllJobsCore` from "./compaction-orchestrator"
9. `calculateAggressiveCompactionSplitIndex`, `calculateCompactionSplitIndex`, `calculateDefaultCompactionSplitIndex` from "./compaction-planner"
10. `CompactionPolicyInput` (type) from "./compaction-policy"
11. `getRecommendedMaxOutputTokens`, `isAtHardContextLimitFromUsage`, `needsCompactionFromUsage`, `shouldCompactFromContextOverflow`, `shouldStartSpeculativeCompaction` from "./compaction-policy"


12. `BuildSummaryInputOptions`, `ModelSummarizerOptions` (types) from "./compaction-prompts"
13. `buildSummaryInput`, `createModelSummarizer`, `DEFAULT_COMPACTION_USER_PROMPT` from "./compaction-prompts"
14. All types from "./compaction-types"
15. `ContinuationMessageData` (type) from "./continuation"
16. `createContinuationMessage`, `getContinuationText` from "./continuation"
17. `runAgentLoop` from "./loop"
18. `MessageTextOptions` (type) from "./message-text"
19. 继续检查剩余的导出项...

从 message-text 模块中导出 `getLastMessageText`、`getLastUserText` 和 `getMessageText` 函数。middleware 模块提供 `MiddlewareConfig` 类型和 `buildMiddlewareChain` 函数。overflow-detection 模块包含 `isContextOverflowError` 和 `isUsageSilentOverflow` 这两个错误检测函数。paths 模块定义了 `AgentPaths` 和 `AgentPathsOptions` 类型，并导出 `createAgentPaths` 函数。session 和 session-store 模块处理会话管理，提供 `SessionManager` 类和 `SessionData` 类型。最后，从 skill-command-prefix 模块导出命令前缀相关的函数和常量。

skills 模块包含 `SkillInfo` 和 `SkillsConfig` 类型定义，以及 `SkillsEngine` 类。todo-continuation 模块提供待办事项相关的配置和延续功能。token-utils 模块导出令牌估算和消息文本提取工具。tool-loop-control 模块处理工具循环控制逻辑，包括完成原因的标准化和手动工具循环继续判断。最后，tool-pruning 模块定义了渐进式修剪的结果类型和配置。

现在需要在各个包中搜索这些导出的具体使用情况，以了解它们在代码库中的实际应用。
